items.desc_zh: Markdown 从来就不是用来预览纯文本的

items.title_en: Toasty
items.title_zh: Toasty
items.desc_en: Shop eco-responsible committed brands
items.desc_zh: 购买具有生态责任感的品牌

items.title_en: GhostDesk
items.title_zh: GhostDesk
items.desc_en: Your invisible AI co-pilot for interviews & meetings
items.desc_zh: 您面试和会议的隐形人工智能副驾驶

items.title_en: Morgan Stanley predicts these beaten-down Chinese stocks can rebound on easing Middle East tensions
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利预测，随着中东紧张局势缓和，这些遭受重创的中国股市可能会反弹
items.desc_en: The strategists looked at Chinese companies with significant revenue exposure to the region.
items.desc_zh: 策略师们关注的是在该地区有大量收入的中国公司。

items.title_en: Ukraine and Russia accuse each other of hundreds of ceasefire violations
items.title_zh: 乌克兰和俄罗斯互相指责对方数百次违反停火协议
items.desc_en: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says his nation's forces would respond "symmetrically" to Russian attacks.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示，乌克兰军队将对俄罗斯的袭击作出“对称”反应。

items.title_en: At least 30 feared dead in crush at Haitian tourist site
items.title_zh: 海地旅游胜地发生碾压事故 恐造成至少 30 人死亡
items.desc_en: The incident occurred at a "tourist event attended by many young people", Haiti's prime minister says.
items.desc_zh: 海地总理表示，这起事件发生在“许多年轻人参加的旅游活动”上。

items.title_en: Hungarians vote in landmark election closely watched by EU, Russia, U.S.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利人在欧盟、俄罗斯和美国密切关注的具有里程碑意义的选举中投票
items.desc_en: Prime Minister Viktor Orban has carved ‌out a model of an "illiberal democracy" seen as a blueprint by populist movements.
items.desc_zh: 总理维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orban）制定了一个“非自由民主”模式，被民粹主义运动视为蓝图。

items.title_en: Revenue by Sleek Analytics
items.title_zh: Revenue by Sleek Analytics
items.desc_en: See your revenue alongside your traffic. In real time.
items.desc_zh: 查看您的收入和流量。实时。

items.title_en: deckpipe.dev
items.title_zh: deckpipe.dev
items.desc_en: agent-first slide renderer
items.desc_zh: 代理优先幻灯片渲染器

items.title_en: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
items.title_zh: 债券市场对私人信贷危机的担忧如何在固定收益 ETF 中体现
items.desc_en: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.
items.desc_zh: 就在越来越多且透明度较低的债券市场被纳入更多固定收益 ETF 之际，对私人信贷危机的担忧也随之而来。

items.title_en: Battles brew over in-state tuition for undocumented students
items.title_zh: 无证学生州内学费之争正在酝酿之中
items.desc_en: In some states, undocumented students have access to in-state college tuition if they meet certain requirements. Now, many of those laws are being challenged.
items.desc_zh: 在某些州，无证学生如果满足某些要求，可以获得州内大学学费。现在，其中许多法律正在受到挑战。

items.title_en: Berkshire electric utility's court win could save it billions
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔电力公司在法庭上的胜利可以为其节省数十亿美元
items.desc_en: PacifiCorp court win could reduce wildfire damages by $1 billion or more.
items.desc_zh: PacifiCorp 胜诉可将野火损失减少 10 亿美元或更多。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.title_en: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title_en: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
items.desc_en: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.
items.desc_zh: 该项目是承诺英国可能成为人工智能超级大国的一​​揽子技术投资的一部分。

items.title_en: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将终止对旧版 Kindle 的支持，引发用户强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.
items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。

items.title_en: WinScript
items.title_zh: WinScript
items.desc_en: The AppleScript for Windows for AI desktop control
items.desc_zh: 用于 AI 桌面控制的 AppleScript for Windows

items.title_en: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
items.title_zh: 希腊明年起禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
items.desc_zh: 法国和西班牙等其他欧洲国家也采取了类似举措。

items.title_en: Brit says he is not elusive Bitcoin creator named by New York Times
items.title_zh: 英国人表示他并不是《纽约时报》点名的难以捉摸的比特币创造者
items.desc_en: The British computer scientist and entrepreneur has denied being the man who the New York Times identified at Satoshi Nakamoto.
items.desc_zh: 这位英国计算机科学家兼企业家否认自己就是《纽约时报》认定的中本聪。

items.title_en: SigmaMind MCP
items.title_zh: SigmaMind MCP
items.desc_en: Build and control voice AI agents via MCP
items.desc_zh: 通过 MCP 构建和控制语音 AI 代理

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Is there a way to fix AI's problem with trust?
items.desc_zh: 有没有办法解决人工智能的信任问题？

items.title_en: Ex-Meta worker investigated for downloading 30,000 private Facebook photos
items.title_zh: 前 Meta 员工因下载 30,000 张 Facebook 私人照片而受到调查
items.desc_en: The former employee was fired from Meta after being suspected of downloading 30,000 photos, the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，这名前员工因涉嫌下载 30,000 张照片而被 Meta 解雇。

items.title_en: OpenAI encourages firms to trial four-day weeks to adapt to AI era
items.title_zh: OpenAI鼓励企业试用四天周以适应人工智能时代
items.desc_en: The ChatGPT-maker said its early policy ideas aim to prompt discussions about action needed as AI systems become more capable.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 制造商表示，其早期政策想法旨在促进有关随着人工智能系统变得更加强大而需要采取的行动的讨论。

items.title_en: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
items.title_zh: 企业争先恐后地通过人工智能搜索引起关注
items.desc_en: Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.
items.desc_zh: 公司正在改变他们在网站上呈现信息的方式，因此他们会受到人工智能的关注。

items.title_en: Skills Janitor
items.title_zh: Skills Janitor
items.desc_en: Find which Claude Code skills you actually use
items.desc_zh: 查找您实际使用的克劳德代码技能

items.desc_en: YouTube, but you clearly understand everyone
items.desc_zh: YouTube，但你清楚地了解每个人

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Attribution science is becoming an increasingly important tool in climate lawsuits.
items.desc_zh: 归因科学正在成为气候诉讼中越来越重要的工具。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Humans are returning to the Moon - hear about it on the BBC’s space podcast, 13 Minutes
items.desc_zh: 人类即将重返月球 - 在 BBC 太空播客 13 分钟中了解相关内容
